import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/staff/Surveys.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/staff/Surveys.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import {
  ClipboardList,
  MessageSquare,
  CheckCircle,
  Clock,
  Send,
  ChevronRight,
  ArrowLeft,
  Star
} from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
const surveyQuestions = {
  "1": [
    {
      id: "q1",
      text: "How would you rate the current safety procedures in your workplace?",
      type: "rating",
      required: true
    },
    {
      id: "q2",
      text: "Which areas of safety do you feel need improvement? (Select all that apply)",
      type: "multiple-choice",
      options: ["Emergency procedures", "Equipment maintenance", "Training programs", "Incident reporting", "Personal protective equipment"],
      required: true
    },
    {
      id: "q3",
      text: "Please provide any additional comments or suggestions about workplace safety:",
      type: "text",
      required: false
    }
  ],
  "2": [
    {
      id: "q1",
      text: "How satisfied are you with your current work environment?",
      type: "rating",
      required: true
    },
    {
      id: "q2",
      text: "What aspects of your work environment are most important to you?",
      type: "multiple-choice",
      options: ["Work-life balance", "Team collaboration", "Career development", "Recognition", "Compensation"],
      required: true
    },
    {
      id: "q3",
      text: "What suggestions do you have to improve employee satisfaction?",
      type: "text",
      required: false
    }
  ]
};
const mockSurveys = [
  {
    id: "1",
    title: "Workplace Safety Feedback",
    description: "Help us improve our safety standards",
    status: "available",
    dueDate: "2026-04-15",
    totalQuestions: 3,
    isAnonymous: true,
    questions: surveyQuestions["1"]
  },
  {
    id: "2",
    title: "Employee Satisfaction Survey",
    description: "Share your thoughts about your work environment",
    status: "completed",
    completedDate: "2026-04-01",
    totalQuestions: 3,
    isAnonymous: true,
    questions: surveyQuestions["2"]
  },
  {
    id: "3",
    title: "Training Needs Assessment",
    description: "Identify training opportunities",
    status: "completed",
    completedDate: "2026-03-15",
    totalQuestions: 1,
    isAnonymous: false
  }
];
export default function StaffSurveys() {
  _s();
  const [surveys, setSurveys] = useState(mockSurveys);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("available");
  const [activeSurvey, setActiveSurvey] = useState(null);
  const [responses, setResponses] = useState({});
  const [viewingResponses, setViewingResponses] = useState(null);
  const availableSurveys = surveys.filter((s) => s.status === "available");
  const completedSurveys = surveys.filter((s) => s.status === "completed");
  const displayedSurveys = activeTab === "available" ? availableSurveys : completedSurveys;
  const handleStartSurvey = (survey) => {
    setActiveSurvey(survey);
    setResponses({});
  };
  const handleResponseChange = (questionId, value) => {
    setResponses((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      [questionId]: value
    }));
  };
  const handleSubmitSurvey = () => {
    if (!activeSurvey) return;
    const requiredQuestions = activeSurvey.questions?.filter((q) => q.required) || [];
    const allRequiredAnswered = requiredQuestions.every((q) => responses[q.id]);
    if (!allRequiredAnswered) {
      alert("Please answer all required questions before submitting.");
      return;
    }
    setSurveys((prev) => prev.map(
      (s) => s.id === activeSurvey.id ? { ...s, status: "completed", completedDate: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString().split("T")[0] } : s
    ));
    alert("✅ Survey submitted successfully! Thank you for your feedback.");
    setActiveSurvey(null);
    setResponses({});
    setActiveTab("completed");
  };
  const handleViewResponses = (survey) => {
    const mockResponses = {
      surveyId: survey.id,
      responses: {
        "q1": "4",
        "q2": "Work-life balance, Team collaboration",
        "q3": "More flexible working hours would be great."
      },
      completedDate: survey.completedDate || ""
    };
    setViewingResponses(mockResponses);
  };
  if (activeSurvey) {
    return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "dpgx0", _fgB: 1779104382299, className: "space-y-6", "data-fg-dpgx0": "418.305:425.41178:/src/app/pages/staff/Surveys.tsx:184:7:5000:7386:e:div:xtetxtetxtetxte", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(FGCmp, { _fgT: "div", _fgS: "dpgx2", _fgB: 1779104382299, className: "flex items-center gap-4", "data-fg-dpgx2": "418.305:425.41178:/src/app/pages/staff/Surveys.tsx:186:9:5059:983:e:div:ete", children: [
        /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
          FGCmp,
          {
            _fgT: "button",
            _fgS: "dpgx3",
            _fgB: 1779104382299,
            onClick: () => {
              if (confirm("Are you sure you want to exit? Your progress will not be saved.")) {
                setActiveSurvey(null);
                setResponses({});
              }
